description: Anatoly interviews Jason Peetz, CEO and co-founder of OSOM, discussing his unique background in hardware and astrophysics, his journey from Berkeley to building solar panels, and insights from his experiences in Silicon Valley.
topic_summary: Jason Peetz shares his transition from astrophysics to hardware development, detailing his experiences with telescopes and solar panels, and the lessons learned from running a motorcycle company and consulting in Silicon Valley [t=9:36-175:01].
